parameters.jsCode: const s=this.getWorkflowStaticData('global');const c=$('Backend Config').item.json;const d=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];if(!s.ai||s.ai.reset!==d){s.ai={groq:{i:0,c:[0,0,0,0]},gemini:{i:0,c:[0,0,0,0]},prov:'groq',reset:d};}let key='',prov=s.ai.prov,url='',model='';if(prov==='groq'){let f=false;for(let i=s.ai.groq.i;i<4;i++){if(s.ai.groq.c[i]<c.groqDailyLimit){key=c.groqKeys[i];s.ai.groq.i=i;f=true;break;}}if(!f){s.ai.prov='gemini';prov='gemini';}else{url='https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions';model='llama-3.3-70b-versatile';}}if(prov==='gemini'){let f=false;for(let i=s.ai.gemini.i;i<4;i++){if(s.ai.gemini.c[i]<c.geminiDailyLimit){key=c.geminiKeys[i];s.ai.gemini.i=i;f=true;break;}}if(!f){prov='exhausted';}else{url='https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.0-flash:generateContent';model='gemini-2.0-flash';}}return [{json:{...items[0].json,aiKey:key,aiProv:prov,aiUrl:url,aiModel:model,aiDone:prov==='exhausted'}}];
const s=new Set();return items.filter(i=>{const k=(i.json.jobTitle+'|'+i.json.company).toLowerCase();if(s.has(k))return false;s.add(k);return true;});

const max=14;const now=new Date();return items.filter(i=>{if(!i.json.postedDate)return true;const d=Math.floor((now-new Date(i.json.postedDate))/(86400000));if(d>max)return false;i.json.daysOld=d;i.json.priority=d<=2?'HIGH':d<=7?'NORMAL':'LOW';return true;});
const jobs=items;const msg=`Found ${jobs.length} jobs scoring >= 60`;return [{json:{message:msg,chatId:$('User Profile').item.json.telegramChatId}}];
